name: Usha Martin Limited
summary: Usha Martin Limited, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells wires, wire ropes, and strands products in India and internationally. The company offers wire ropes, including oil and offshore, crane, mining, elevator, fishing, and general engineering ropes, as well as ropes for conveyor cords, aerial haulage, and structural systems. It also manufactures a range of industrial machines, including wire drawing machines, stranding machines, wire rope closing machines, steel plant equipment, and material handling equipment; machines for manufacturing bright bars; machines for armoring and rewinding; and copper coating lines for CO2 welding wire manufacture. Further, it provides pre-stressing products and services comprising anchorage, sheathing, multipull and single pulling hydraulic jacks and pumps, and grout pumps and agitators; and grips, wire jacks, and hand and power-operated pumps, as well as installation services. Additionally, the company offers spring, ACSR, cold heading quality, auto spoke, brush, needle, cycle, and profile based wires, as well as steel wires for pre-stressed concrete and wires for fasteners; and bright low relaxation (LRPC), normal relaxation, galvanized LRPC, polymer coated galvanized/bright LRPC, grease/wax filled un-bonded, bonded LRPC strands, as well as plain, indented, and ribbed high tensile steel wire for prestressed concrete. It also provides aerial copper, underground optical fiber, optical fiber, and armored / duct jelly filled copper cables. The company was founded in 1960 and is based in Kolkata, India.
